description: Breathlessness and Wheeze in Coal Miners
skip_reason: Already an aggregated count table (Freq column, 36 rows covering all Breathlessness × Wheeze × Age cells). No treatment/exposure variable — both Breathlessness and Wheeze are binary symptom co-occurrence variables with no natural treatment group. This is a cross-tabulation of two symptoms by age group in coal miners, not a treatment vs. control study design suitable for Simpson's Paradox modeling.
